meta.title: Method Studio - Strategic Design
meta.description: Design agency transforming brands through strategic thinking and exceptional craft with modern responsive layouts

sections.headline: WE DON'T DESIGN LOGOS. WE BUILD BRANDS.
sections.subheadline: Strategic design for companies ready to dominate their market. No templates, no compromises, no bullshit. Just work that converts and systems that scale. Every pixel serves revenue. Every interaction drives growth.

sections.heading: THE METHOD
sections.body:
We're not a design agency. We're a strategic partner that happens to design. Since 2018, we've helped 100+ brands find their voice, dominate their markets, and build systems that scale. Our approach is simple: understand the business first, design the solution second, measure the results always.

We don't care about awards. We care about revenue. We don't care about aesthetics. We care about conversion. Every pixel we place, every word we write, every interaction we design serves one purpose: making our clients more money. This isn't design for design's sake—it's design for business impact.

items.title: NEXUS FINTECH: $12M ARR INCREASE
items.description: Complete brand overhaul and digital transformation for Series B fintech. Rebuilt onboarding from 14 steps to 4. Implemented design system across 8 products. Result: 3x brand awareness, 45% increase in qualified leads, $12M additional ARR within 6 months.

items.title: VERTEX FASHION: 67% CONVERSION LIFT
items.description: E-commerce replatform from Shopify to custom Next.js solution. Built subscription management, dynamic product storytelling, and integrated inventory visibility. Result: 3x increase in DTC revenue, 67% conversion rate improvement, 65% repeat purchase rate increase.

items.title: APEX ANALYTICS: 32% CHURN REDUCTION
items.description: Product design and UX overhaul for B2B analytics platform. Redesigned onboarding, simplified dashboard, and improved data visualization. Result: 32% churn reduction, NPS increase from 45 to 72, 40% improvement in feature adoption.

items.title: FLUX STUDIO: 3 AWARDS IN YEAR ONE
items.description: Complete brand identity and website for creative agency. Created visual system, portfolio showcase, and client portal. Result: Won 3 design awards in first year, 200% increase in inbound leads, featured in Communication Arts.

items.title: BREW COFFEE: 2X ORDER VALUE
items.description: Mobile-first ordering experience for specialty coffee chain. Redesigned menu navigation, implemented dynamic upselling, and streamlined checkout. Result: 98% increase in average order value, 55% mobile conversion improvement, 20% table turnover increase.

items.title: VERTEX LEGAL: 60% INTAKE REDUCTION
items.description: Client intake and case management platform for boutique law firm. Replaced paper processes with digital workflows, automated document generation, and built client portal. Result: Intake time reduced from 3 days to 4 hours, 35% staff efficiency improvement.

items.quote: Method didn't just redesign our brand—they redefined how we think about our business. The ROI was immediate and measurable. $12M in additional ARR within 6 months.
items.name: David Kim

items.quote: Working with Method felt like having an extension of our team. They understood our market and delivered work that converted. 67% conversion rate improvement.
items.name: Lisa Thompson

items.quote: The product redesign Method delivered reduced our churn by 32% and increased NPS to 72. This is what happens when design is strategic, not decorative.
items.name: Marcus Rodriguez

items.quote: Method's mobile ordering system increased our average order value by 98%. The ROI on this project was 12x. We've already hired them for our next project.
items.name: Sarah Chen

sections.heading: READY TO DOMINATE YOUR MARKET?
sections.subheading: Book a free 30-minute strategy call. No pitch, no pressure, just actionable insights you can use immediately. If we're not the right fit, we'll tell you who is.
